headline: Delta Air Lines (DAL) Faces A Valuation Test Following Russell Growth Index Additions
summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) has just been added to several Russell growth benchmarks, including the Russell 1000 Growth and Russell 3000 Growth indexes, drawing fresh attention to how the stock fits in diversified portfolios. See our latest analysis for Delta Air Lines. Index additions are landing at a time when Delta Air Lines’ share price has eased slightly in the last week but still shows strong momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 15.44% and a year to date share price return of 32.75%...

headline: Delta (DAL) Flight 1076 Was Hit By Fireworks During Chicago Landing
summary: Delta Air Lines flight 1076 was struck by fireworks during landing at Chicago Midway. The aircraft landed safely with no injuries reported among passengers or crew. Initial inspections indicated minor paint damage, with no major structural issues disclosed. For investors tracking NYSE:DAL, this incident highlights the type of operational risk that can appear even on routine flights. Delta Air Lines, a major U.S. carrier, operates a large domestic and international network where reliability...

headline: What’s Going on With Amazon Stock on Tuesday?
summary: Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is launching a $25 billion bond sale on Tuesday to fund AI infrastructure investments ahead of its Q2 earnings report on July 30, 2026.
